# 📈  Get Your Content in Google's "People Also Ask" Boxes

## Metadata
- **From:** Syed Balkhi - WPBeginner <support@wpbeginner.com>
- **Date:** 2025-02-25 22:00:00
- **Source:** Gmail IMAP
- **UID:** 574

## Body
Hey Muhammad,

Ever notice those expandable "People Also Ask" boxes in Google
search results? You know, the ones that everyone clicks on?

In fact, I often get asked about these boxes all the time.

And it's no wonder why - these prominent positions can drive
targeted traffic to your site. When your content appears there,
you're capturing the attention of users who are actively seeking
answers to specific questions.

So, I'm excited to share that the FREE All in One SEO plugin 
( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..7yV25Xfvj54jzJOqCrwJ3MHZAchI83i-MgcwOKIThAs ) includes an
FAQ block feature designed to help your content appear in those
coveted "People Also Ask" boxes.

The free version comes with everything you need to:

* Create clean, organized FAQ sections
* Format content in a way search engines understand
* Target question-based searches
* Improve your overall content structure

The best part? You can set it up in minutes. Plus, All in One SEO
comes packed with other powerful features to boost your search
engine rankings.

👉 Download All in One SEO for Free (Get Started with FAQ Blocks
Today)! ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..7yV25Xfvj54jzJOqCrwJ3MHZAchI83i-MgcwOKIThAs )

Want even better results?

All in One SEO Pro ( https://t.dripemail2.com/c/eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9..xsHt7RGha0YZ4Islr5r41XiiAX0PcMxtbbHg6lfJjbY ) includes advanced FAQ
schema markup, which sends even stronger signals to Google about
your FAQ content.

This additional technical SEO boost further increases your
chances of appearing in "People Also Ask" boxes, driving more
targeted traffic your way.

Talk soon,

Syed Balkhi
Founder of WPBeginner
